name: Bug report
about: Something in an Analyse addon isn't working as expected

## What happened

A clear description of the bug. What did you expect to happen? What actually happened?

## Which addon

- [ ] ShopGUIPlus
- [ ] Votifier / NuVotifier
- [ ] PlayerPoints

## How to reproduce

Minimal steps that someone else can follow to trigger the bug.

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Environment

- Addon version: <!-- e.g. 1.0.0 -->
- Analyse plugin version: <!-- e.g. 1.0.0 -->
- Third-party plugin version: <!-- e.g. ShopGUIPlus 3.2.0 -->
- Server software: <!-- Paper / Spigot / Purpur / Folia -->
- Server software version: <!-- full `/version` line -->
- Java version: <!-- `java -version` output -->
- OS: <!-- e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11 -->

## Config

Paste the relevant portion of your addon config.

```yaml
# plugins/Analyse/addons/<addon>/config.yml
...
```

## Logs

Paste the relevant log output, wrapped in a code block. Don't attach a 50 MB log; trim to the lines around the problem.

```
...
```

## Anything else

Screenshots, related plugins, unusual host setups, or other context.
